summary: 4 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Kill Jackie
film.announcement: Catherine Zeta-Jones thriller acquired by AMC+.

film.title: Runaway
film.talent: Josh Duhamel, James Franco, Paula Patton, Summer H. Howell
film.announcement: Action-thriller starring Josh Duhamel, James Franco, and Paula Patton wraps production.

film.title: The Stunt Driver
film.announcement: Independent Film Company acquires comedy starring Jay Baruchel as Canadian daredevil Ken Carter ahead of TIFF premiere.

film.title: Jason Statham Stole My Bike
film.talent: Eddie Peng, Daniel Ings, Artie Wilkinson-Hunt
film.announcement: Action-comedy adds Eddie Peng, Daniel Ings, and Artie Wilkinson-Hunt to cast.

tv.title: RoboCop
tv.announcement: Series ordered at Amazon Prime Video from Blumhouse and Atomic Monster, set to tackle corporate greed.

tv.title: Stamptown
tv.announcement: Comedian Zach Zucker's variety special set to premiere on Netflix in August.
